name: STRATA Skin Sciences, Inc.
business: We are a medical technology company dedicated to developing, commercializing and marketing innovative products for the treatment of dermatologic conditions. Our products include the XTRAC line of excimer lasers and VTRAC lamp systems utilized in the treatment of psoriasis, vitiligo and various other skin conditions. Our products also include the TheraClear X Acne Therapy System utilized in the treatment of mild to moderate inflammatory, comedonal and pustular acne.
sellsTo: U.S. dermatologists and dermatological group clinics under a recurring revenue model
International distributors for equipment sales and recurring revenue

exposures.sentence: Our products include the XTRAC line of excimer lasers and VTRAC lamp systems utilized in the treatment of psoriasis, vitiligo and various other skin conditions.

catalysts.event: Revised CPT code descriptors for excimer laser procedures effective January 1, 2027, expanding reimbursable indications to include vitiligo, atopic dermatitis, and alopecia areata.
catalysts.sentence: Beginning January 1, 2027, revised CPT code descriptors for excimer laser procedures (CPT 96920, 96921 and 96922) will become effective, expanding the scope of reimbursable indications to include additional inflammatory and autoimmune skin conditions beyond psoriasis, including vitiligo, atopic dermatitis and alopecia areata.

tamClaims.claim: Psoriasis and vitiligo affect up to 13 million people in the U.S. and 195 million people worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: Psoriasis and vitiligo alone affect up to 13 million people in the U.S. and 195 million people worldwide.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 8 million people in the United States and up to 125 million people worldwide suffer from psoriasis.
tamClaims.sentence: We believe there are approximately 8 million people in the United States and up to 125 million people worldwide suffering from psoriasis

tamClaims.claim: The target U.S. audience for XTRAC lasers comprises approximately 3,500 dermatologists who perform disease management.
tamClaims.sentence: The target U.S. audience for XTRAC lasers comprises approximately 3,500 dermatologists who perform disease management.
